summary: Crystal‑clear recording of a stellar show, highlighted by a crackling China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence.
review: Both reviewers rave about the flawless sound and perfect setlist, calling the recording "perfect" and noting that every note Jerry played on the China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider was crackling with energy. The performance is described as powerful and one of their favorites, indicating a top‑tier show captured in excellent condition.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are 5‑star and praise the music and sound as outstanding; with only two reviews confidence is limited but the consensus is strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the setlist and audio quality as perfect, noting clear, crackling guitar tones; no specific flaws or source type mentioned.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist called "perfect" with high energy throughout; the show flows smoothly and is highly recommended.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Every note Jerry played was crackling with energy; his tone praised as perfect.
